role: Brigadier General; Head of the Supreme Leader's Military Office
bio: Mohammad Shirazi was a Brigadier General who headed the military section of the [Supreme Leader's Military Office](/orgs/supreme-leaders-military-office) (beit-e rahbari), overseeing [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei)'s direct military staff. He was killed on 28 February 2026 in the combined US-Israel decapitation strikes targeting Iran's military and security leadership. His death, alongside deputy [Akbar Ebrahimzadeh](/people/akbar-ebrahimzadeh), effectively destroyed the Supreme Leader's personal military command apparatus.
editorial_notes: Head of Supreme Leader's Military Office (beit-e rahbari military section). Killed 28 Feb 2026.
